prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, commonly used for stock price forecasting. We assume a historical annual average return (drift) of 10% and an annual volatility of 18% for ITW. These values are used to project the price for 7 days. The point estimate represents the expected price, while the confidence intervals reflect the range within which the price is expected to fall with the given probabilities, considering the estimated volatility. The intervals widen as the confidence level increases due to inherent market uncertainty.
